_comment: V1.6.0: Scrape configuration for supplier websites. Pattern: 'direct' = single price, 'table' = tiered pricing, 'none' = directory-only (no scraping). pricePath = custom URL path for price page.

_coverage_model._comment: postalCodesServed is the authoritative source for postal_codes_served in the DB. ScrapeConfigSync syncs this field on every deploy. Default: union merge (adds ZIPs, never removes). To shrink coverage: add postalCodesOverride: true to the entry. Migrations after 100 must NOT write postal_codes_served.
